element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Resource management; prevents life bar depletion—core survival mechanic
Single-direction projectile; limited to horizontal fire
Traps and enemy patterns; avoidance-based gameplay
Progressive power scaling; picking up same weapon type consecutively
Stone destruction capability; sustained across weapon switches until life lost
Pace variation; temporary speed boost for stage transit
Pattern recognition and sustained combat; culminates each stage

typical_tension_triggers: Life bar depletion from fruit scarcity
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Obstacle-course rhythm with resource attrition; tension builds across each area as fruit becomes scarce, relieved by weapon pickups and safe zones; boss encounters reset pacing via distinct combat phase

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Bonus stages accessible via input sequence during intro (rapid X-button during opening cinema); level select via L+Right+X+Start on second title screen appearance

difficulty_curve.early_game: Foundational platforming and resource management introduction; low enemy density; establishes axe and boomerang weapon systems
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Increased trap complexity; enemy variety escalation; introduction of advanced mechanics (crouch-jump, skateboard); sustained fruit scarcity pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Dense obstacle combinations; boss encounters at stage-end requiring pattern mastery; firepower progression maintains challenge pacing
notable_spikes: Stage 1, Area 4 (first boss encounter—introduces combat phase rhythm)
Mid-stage trap sequences with coordinated enemy spawns
Final stage escalation across all five worlds

notable_level_patterns.description: Each of five stages contains four distinct areas: first three are obstacle-course traversal with enemies/traps; fourth is dedicated boss battle. Creates consistent pacing: exploration → resource depletion tension → boss reset.
Life bar depletes over time unless fruit is collected continuously. Forces active exploration and resource-seeking behavior; creates underlying tension independent of enemy presence.
Single shots → triple shots → fireball upgrades via consecutive same-weapon pickups. Creates micro-progressions within single run; incentivizes weapon discipline.

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Super Adventure Island (bonus stage, level select, bonus stage tour)
